view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fair distribution algorithm.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fair distribution algorithm.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the fair distribution algorithm, which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates how the system ensures that the same person is not always asked to cover for classes. The evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that would confirm the implementation of this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
